name: WW Cinnamon Rolls
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Buttermilk Biscuits, Refrigerated (10 biscuits in "tube")
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray an 8x8x2 inch baking pan and set aside.
3. Separate biscuits; using fingers, flatten each into a 3-inch circle.
4. Brush each circle with an equal amount of margarine.
5. Sprinkle each with 0.25 tsp brown sugar and an equal amount of cinnamon.
6. Top each with 1T raisins.
7. Roll each circle in jelly-roll fashion.
8. Arrange the rolls in two rows, seam side down, in the sprayed pan.
9. Bake until rolls are puffed and golden brown, 8-12 minutes.
10. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let rolls cool in the pan.
In a small bowl or cup:
1. Combine remaining 2.5 tsp brown sugar and the powdered sugar.
2. Add water, 1 tsp at a time, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and syrupy.
3. Remove rolls to a serving platter.
4. Brush each with an equal amount of sugar mixture.
Makes 10 servings (1 roll each). Each serving provides: 1 BREAD, 1/2 FAT, 1/2 FRUIT and 20 OPTIONAL CALORIES. Per serving: 143 calories, 5 g fat. Source: WW Favorite Recipes (1986). Hard to eat just one!!
